zh.lifeSummary: John Engaine是Nicholas de Engaine和Agnes Fauconberg的兒子，於1302年5月30日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可。他於1318年與Joan Peverel結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年2月16日在他的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特沃爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Engaine是Nicholas de Engaine和Agnes Fauconberg的儿子，于1302年5月30日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉黑維可。他于1318年与Joan Peverel结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年2月16日在他的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特沃爾。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: John Engaine was born on 30 May 1302, in Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, England as the son of Nicholas de Engaine and Agnes Fauconberg. He married Joan Peverel in 1318. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 16 February 1358, in his hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Worle, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1358, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Worle, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Engaineは1302年5月30日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラスアーウイクでNicholas de EngaineとAgnes Fauconbergの息子として生まれた。1318年にJoan Peverelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年2月16日に故郷で55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウオルルにて埋葬された。

ko.Stow Cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스타우 c 크이
ko.lifeSummary: John Engaine(은)는 1302년 5월 30일 영국 노르섬프토실르 블래더w이c크에서 Nicholas de Engaine(와)과 Agnes Fauconberg의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1318년 Joan Peverel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 2월 16일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 워일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Engaine nasceu em 30 de maio de 1302, em Blatherwycke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filho de Nicholas de Engaine e Agnes Fauconberg. Ele casou-se com Joan Peverel em 1318. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1358, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Worle, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stow Cum Quy, Cambridgeshire, England: стоу кум куи, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: John Engaine родился 30 мая 1302 г. в местности блатирвикк, нортамптоншир, Англия. Его родителей звали Nicholas de Engaine и Agnes Fauconberg. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Peverel в 1318 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 16 февраля 1358 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности ворл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1358, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Worle, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
